factions.name: The Aurelian Concord
factions.description: Those who build. A pluralist coalition bound by charter, the arcane academy, and the dawn-faith.

factions.name: The Wildreach Pact
factions.description: Those who endure. A sworn confederation of the exiled and untamed, bound by survival and honor.

races.name: Aurin
races.description: Adaptable dawn-faith builders; the Concord's founders and its conscience.

races.name: Sylvani
races.description: Graceful, long-lived ley-attuned folk of the forest-spires.

races.name: Karnat
races.description: Runecrafting forge-folk; veins etched with arcane lines that pulse with lattice-work.

races.name: Cogwright
races.description: Clockwork engineers whose hands move with mechanical precision and arcane insight.

races.name: Lucen
races.description: Dawn-touched seers bearing the radiant scar of their first sunrise, attuned to faith and prophecy.

races.name: Brael
races.description: Honor-bound guardians who swear the Oath of the Last Watch; the Concord's first and last line of defense.

races.name: Ordan
races.description: Green-skinned honorbound warriors; the Pact's martial core.

races.name: Vorni
races.description: Auroch-kin plains-folk, spirit shamans and the Pact's moral center.

races.name: Voss
races.description: Hollow-folk reclaimed from the crypt's chill; bearing the scar of their return with quiet purpose.

races.name: Tza'ri
races.description: Desert walkers bound in honor to ancestor-spirits; guidance and insight flow through every bloodline.

races.name: Ashkin
races.description: Trickster engineers of the deep wastes; every gear turns twice, and nothing is ever what it seems.

races.name: Sarn
races.description: Dragon-touched warrior-folk; scales and fiery breath mark the ancient pact that still burns.

classes.name: Vanguard
classes.description: Frontline martial soldier; a wall of steel and fury.

classes.name: Templar
classes.description: Armored holy warrior who mends allies and smites the unworthy.

classes.name: Warden
classes.description: Totemic elementalist who channels the forces through earthen wards.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: Marksman and beast-companion, master of the untamed reach.

classes.name: Arcanist
classes.description: Scholar of raw arcane; Lattice woven into bolts and flame.

classes.name: Shade
classes.description: Stealthed assassin striking from shadow with precise lethality.

classes.name: Revenant
classes.description: Plate-clad tank/DPS hybrid wielding runic power and the Hollow force.

classes.name: Riftblade
classes.description: Leather-clad tank/DPS hybrid wielding Havoc and the Rift force.

classes.name: Wilder
classes.description: Shapeshifting primal who draws power from the Bloom force, shifting between bear, cat, and eagle forms to tank, DPS, or travel.

classes.name: Occultist
classes.description: Pact-caster who bargains with Deep entities, wielding Rift, Hollow, and Deep forces through soul shards and summoned minions.

classes.name: Ascetic
classes.description: Inner-force martial artist who channels Ki through martial arts. Can tank, heal, or deal damage depending on stance.

classes.name: Oracle
classes.description: Radiance-healer and void-caller who wields both Dawn and Deep (Umbra) forces through prophecy and divine vision.

classes.name: Channeler
classes.description: Mid-range empowerment mage who channels Essence and mana through Lattice·Bloom forces, weaving healing and damage in a flow of arcane energy.
